_comment: Verified phrase banks per language. Small models (<3B) MUST use these instead of generating phrases. Each entry: target text (pronunciation). Only include phrases we are 100% certain are correct.

Japanese.thanks: ありがとうございます (a-ri-ga-tou go-zai-ma-su)
Japanese.how_much: いくらですか？ (i-ku-ra de-su ka?)
Japanese.menu_please: メニューください (me-nyu ku-da-sai)
Japanese.got_seats: 席ありますか？ (se-ki a-ri-ma-su ka?)
Japanese.bill: お会計お願いします (o-kai-kei o-ne-gai shi-ma-su)
Japanese.bathroom: トイレはどこですか？ (to-i-re wa do-ko de-su ka?)

French.this_please: Ça, s'il vous plaît (sa seel voo PLEH)
French.menu_please: La carte, s'il vous plaît (la kart seel voo PLEH)
French.got_seats: Vous avez une table ? (voo za-VAY oon TAHBL?)
French.water: De l'eau, s'il vous plaît (duh LO seel voo PLEH)
French.bill: L'addition, s'il vous plaît (la-dee-SYON seel voo PLEH)
French.bathroom: Où sont les toilettes ? (oo son lay twa-LET?)

Spanish.menu_please: La carta, por favor (la KAR-ta por fa-VOR)
Spanish.bill: La cuenta, por favor (la KWEN-ta por fa-VOR)
Spanish.bathroom: ¿Dónde está el baño? (DON-deh es-TA el BAN-yo?)

Mandarin.this_please: 我要这个 (wǒ yào zhè ge)
Mandarin.got_seats: 有位子吗？ (yǒu wèi zi ma?)
Mandarin.bathroom: 洗手间在哪里？ (xǐ shǒu jiān zài nǎ lǐ?)

Vietnamese.this_please: Cho tôi cái này (cho toy kai nai)
Vietnamese.menu_please: Cho tôi xem thực đơn (cho toy sem tuhk duhn)
Vietnamese.bathroom: Nhà vệ sinh ở đâu? (nya vey sin uh dow?)

Thai.this_please: เอาอันนี้ (ao an nee)
Thai.got_seats: มีโต๊ะไหม? (mee dto mai?)
Thai.water: น้ำเปล่า (nam bplao)
Thai.bill: เก็บเงิน (gep ngern)
Thai.bathroom: ห้องน้ำอยู่ที่ไหน? (hong nam yoo tee nai?)
